mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alphasift_tasks (task_id, strategy, market, status, progress, parameters, result_stocks, result_count, error_message, created_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{strategy}, #{market}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{parameters}, #{resultStocks}, #{resultCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{completedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE alphasift_tasks SET strategy=#{strategy}, market=#{market}, status=#{status}, progress=#{progress}, parameters=#{parameters}, result_stocks=#{resultStocks}, result_count=#{resultCount}, error_message=#{errorMessage}, completed_at=#{completedAt} WHERE task_id=#{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alphasift_tasks ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM alphasift_tasks WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE alphasift_tasks SET status=#{status}, progress=#{progress} WHERE task_id=#{taskId}
UPDATE alphasift_tasks SET status=#{status}, result_stocks=#{resultStocks}, result_count=#{resultCount}, error_message=#{errorMessage}, completed_at=#{completedAt} WHERE task_id=#{taskId}
